news.t: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX Single-Stock ETFs on BMNR, CRWV, and CRCL

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Inverse CRWV Daily Target ETF (CORD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide (-2x) inverse exposure to the daily price movement of CoreWeave, Inc. stock (NASDAQ: CRWV), less fees and expenses CORD was launched on Sep 26, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches Three New T-REX Single-Stock ETFs on BMNR, CRWV, and CRCL
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares is pleased to announce the launch of three new leveraged and inverse ETFs: the T-REX 2X Long BMNR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: BMNU), the T-REX 2X Inverse CRWV Daily Targ...
